reference_proof:
by
  induction xs generalizing acc with
  | nil => simp [b3_g002, b3_f002]
  | cons x xs ih =>
      simp [b3_g002, b3_f002, ih, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm]

by
  induction xs generalizing acc with
  | nil => simp [b3_g003, b3_f003]
  | cons x xs ih =>
      simp [b3_g003, b3_f003, ih, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm]

by
  induction xs with
  | nil => simp [b3_f004]
  | cons x xs ih =>
      simp [b3_f004, ih, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm]

by
  induction xs with
  | nil => simp [b3_f006]
  | cons x xs ih => simp [b3_f006, ih, Bool.and_assoc]

by
  induction xs with
  | nil => intro h; cases h
  | cons x xs ih =>
      intro h
      cases h with
      | inl hx => exact Or.inl hx
      | inr ht => exact Or.inr (ih ht)

by
  induction t with
  | leaf => rfl
  | node l x r ihl ihr => simp [b3_f010, b3_g010, ihl, ihr]

by
  induction t with
  | leaf => rfl
  | node l x r ihl ihr => simp [b3_f012, ihl, ihr]

by
  induction t with
  | leaf => rfl
  | node l x r ihl ihr => simp [b3_f014, ihl, ihr]

by
  induction n with
  | zero => simp [b3_f016]
  | succ n ih => simp [b3_f016, ih, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm]

by
  intro h y
  cases h with
  | intro x hx => exact Exists.intro x (hx y)

metadata.private_label: finite cases with tempting simplification-only route

reference_proof:
by
  cases o with
  | none =>
      exact Or.inl rfl
  | some x =>
      exact Or.inr (Exists.intro x rfl)
